description: A suspect in an insider threat case has exfiltrated a confidential corporate photograph to a USB drive by splitting it into three fragments ('sys_cache.bin', 'win_temp.dat', and 'swap_frag.sys'), disguising them, and deleting them. Create a forensic case named 'Fragment_Recovery_2024' (case number 'INV-FRAG-001') in Autopsy using the disk image at /home/ga/evidence/exfil_usb.dd. Locate, tag as 'Notable Item', and export these fragments to /home/ga/Reports/fragments/. Reconstruct the original JPEG image at /home/ga/Reports/reconstructed_evidence.jpg by determining the correct sequential order of the fragments. Write a forensic report to /home/ga/Reports/reconstruction_report.txt containing exactly these lines: 'CASE_NAME: Fragment_Recovery_2024', 'FRAGMENTS_RECOVERED: 3', 'CORRECT_ORDER: <file1>, <file2>, <file3>' (using the comma-separated sequence of filenames), 'RECONSTRUCTED_MD5: <md5_hash_of_reconstructed_file>', and 'FILE_TYPE: JPEG image'.
